name: Cooper 12-Minute Test
relatedModules: VO2 & Metabolic Lab | Pace Lab | Training Pace Lab | Race Lab | Export Tools
limitation: A 12-minute field estimate is not lab-measured VO2max. It is affected by pacing, motivation, weather, surface, GPS/track accuracy, and running economy.

name: 1-Mile Time Trial
relatedModules: Pace Lab | Race Lab | Training Pace Lab | Track Split Calculator | Export Tools
limitation: Short time trials are sensitive to pacing, anaerobic ability, warmup quality, and track accuracy. They are not enough alone to model longer-distance endurance.

name: 3K Time Trial
relatedModules: Pace Lab | Race Lab | Critical Speed Lab | Training Pace Lab | Export Tools
limitation: 3K performance can overrepresent speed-oriented runners and underrepresent longer endurance. Use with other tests for broader modeling.

name: 5K Time Trial
relatedModules: Pace Lab | Race Lab | Training Pace Lab | Zone Lab | Export Tools
limitation: A solo 5K time trial may differ from race performance due to motivation, course, weather, pacing, and measurement error.

name: 20-Minute Threshold Test
relatedModules: Training Pace Lab | Zone Lab | Pace Lab | Heart Rate Lab | Export Tools
limitation: A 20-minute test estimates threshold pace but does not directly measure lactate threshold or MLSS. Result depends heavily on pacing and conditions.

name: 30-Minute LTHR Test
relatedModules: Heart Rate Lab | Zone Lab | Training Pace Lab | Recovery Check Lab | Export Tools
limitation: LTHR field estimate depends on HR sensor quality, heat, fatigue, caffeine, hydration, and pacing. It is not a blood lactate test.

name: 2-Point Critical Speed Test
relatedModules: Critical Speed Lab | Training Pace Lab | Race Lab | Pace Lab | Export Tools
limitation: Two-point CS can be unstable if trials are not maximal, too close in duration, or affected by different conditions. No single CS testing method is universally optimal.

name: 3-Point Critical Speed Test
formulaHooks: three_point_cs | linear_regression_distance_time | critical_pace_converter | d_prime | residual_check | critical_speed_zones
relatedModules: Critical Speed Lab | Training Pace Lab | Race Lab | Pace Lab | Export Tools
limitation: Three-point CS is more robust than two-point but still depends on maximal effort quality, trial spacing, route accuracy, and model assumptions.

name: HR Recovery Test
relatedModules: Recovery Check Lab | Heart Rate Lab | Export Tools
limitation: HR recovery is affected by intensity, heat, hydration, caffeine, stress, sleep, sensor error, posture, and recovery mode. Use only for personal trend tracking.

name: Sweat Rate Test
relatedModules: Fuel & Hydration Lab | Environment Lab | Long Run Planner | Export Tools
limitation: Field sweat rate is affected by scale precision, clothing water retention, unrecorded fluid/urine, gut contents, and environmental changes.

name: Treadmill Calibration Test
relatedModules: Treadmill Lab | Pace Lab | VO2 & Metabolic Lab | Export Tools
limitation: Consumer treadmills, footpods, and watches all have error. Calibration should be displayed as a confidence note, not a certified correction.

name: Cadence Test
relatedModules: Biomechanics Lab | Pace Lab | Export Tools
limitation: Cadence is simple arithmetic but depends on accurate step count and stable pace. It should not be used as a standalone form diagnosis.

name: Stride Length Test
relatedModules: Biomechanics Lab | Pace Lab | Export Tools
limitation: The math is exact from input, but the interpretation is limited by measurement accuracy, pace, terrain, and definition choice.

name: Easy Run Drift Test
relatedModules: Heart Rate Lab | Load Lab | Recovery Check Lab | Environment Lab | Export Tools
limitation: Useful as a repeatable trend metric only. Interpretation is weak when route, weather, terrain, or HR sensor quality changes.

name: Long Run Fueling Test
mainOutputs: carb_g_per_hour | fluid_l_per_hour | sodium_mg_per_hour | sodium_mg_per_l | sweat_rate_optional | fueling_timeline_optional
formulaHooks: carb_total | carb_per_hour | fluid_total | sodium_total | sweat_rate | fueling_timeline
relatedModules: Fuel & Hydration Lab | Long Run Planner | Environment Lab | Race Lab | Export Tools
limitation: Fueling results are highly individual and condition-specific. Track.Lab should calculate observed intake and notes, not prescribe nutrition automatically.
